mapper.insert:
SELECT BIDDING_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO BIDDING (BID_NO, UNVEILING_NO, MEMBER_NO, BID_PRICE, BID_DATE) VALUES (#{bidNo}, #{unveilingNo}, #{memberNo}, #{bidPrice}, SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT BID_PRICE AS bidPrice, TO_CHAR(BID_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS bidDate FROM BIDDING WHERE UNVEILING_NO = #{unveilingNo} ORDER BY BID_DATE DESC, BID_NO DESC FETCH FIRST #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT BID_NO, UNVEILING_NO, MEMBER_NO, BID_PRICE, BID_DATE FROM BIDDING WHERE UNVEILING_NO = #{unveilingNo} ORDER BY BID_PRICE DESC, BID_DATE DESC, BID_NO DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
